_comment: TEMPLATE for /etc/family-inc/property_searches.json (mode 600, owner familyinc). Holds your personal saved searches (area/price/rooms) — NEVER committed; lives only on the VPS (SPEC §12.1, D-024). Replace the placeholders below. 'madlan' is optional; remove it to scrape Yad2 only.
_comment_primary: The 'url' is what the on-box Chromium PRIMARY fetches. Use a real saved-search results URL from each portal.
_comment_secondary: Apify is the SECONDARY source (D-040), used only when the primary is blocked/empty or a field is missing. It needs FAMILY_INC_APIFY_TOKEN in /etc/family-inc/env (Apify Console -> API & Integrations). Without the token the Apify path stays inert and the lane is primary-only. Yad2 (amit123~yadscraper) reuses the 'url' above automatically — no 'apify' block needed. Madlan (swerve~madlan-scraper) is PARAMETRIC and does NOT accept a URL, so a Madlan entry MUST carry an 'apify' block with at least {city, dealType}; params are never guessed from the url (it would fail loud).

searches.label: example — replace with your Yad2 saved search
